citations.text: AI4K12 Initiative (2020-2022). Five Big Ideas in Artificial Intelligence, Grade Band Progression Charts. A joint project of AAAI and CSTA, funded by NSF award DRL-1846073.

statement.en: Both people and computers can learn by finding patterns in data, or by trial and error. But people are flexible learners who can adapt to unfamiliar situations and learn in other ways, such as by observing others, by asking questions, or by making connections to prior learning.
